Curriculum Vitae

Physics undergraduate focused on astrophysics, gravitational waves, and cosmology.

A redesigned CV page based on the original site content, presented in the Apple-inspired visual system.

Yuze Guo Wuhan University Astrophysics
Download PDF Back to Home

Academic Profile

Physics undergraduate at Wuhan University, with long-term academic focus on astrophysics, cosmology, and gravitational waves.

Current Position

Undergraduate student majoring in Physics at the School of Physics and Technology, Wuhan University.

Email: guoyuze@whu.edu.cn
Phone: (+86) 136-5075-9277
Website: https://ryan-gwo.github.io/

Research Interests

High-energy astrophysics, especially gravitational waves, cosmology, and multi-messenger astronomy.

Systematic astronomy learning began in high school through HFAA activities, later extended into national and international olympiad competition.

Education

Formal education trajectory reconstructed from the original resume data.

Peking University

PhD in Astrophysics · Beijing · Expected from Fall 2026

Planned doctoral study at the Department of Astronomy, School of Physics.

Wuhan University

BSc in Physics · Wuhan · 2022–2026

Coursework includes General Physics, Theoretical Mechanics, Electrodynamics, Quantum Mechanics, Statistical Physics, Mathematical Methods for Physicists, Group Theory, General Astronomy, and Astrophysics.

Honors & Awards

Selected awards recorded across the original resume and About page.

National Scholarship

Ministry of Education of the People’s Republic of China · 2024

National-level scholarship awarded for outstanding undergraduate academic performance and comprehensive development.

Annual Scholarship of National Astronomical Observatories, CAS

National Astronomical Observatories, Chinese Academy of Sciences · 2024

Scholarship awarded to outstanding undergraduate students in astronomy and related disciplines.

CNAO 2020 Gold Medal

National Astronomy Olympiad

Gold medal in a national astronomy olympiad competition.

IOAA 2021 Gold Medal

International Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics

Gold medal in an international astronomy olympiad competition.

Skills & Languages

A final section for the core capabilities retained from the original CV data.

Technical Skills

  • LaTeX — document preparation, academic writing, typesetting, bibliographies

Languages

  • Chinese — Native speaker
  • English — Fluent

Focus Areas

  • Astrophysics
  • Cosmology

Location

Wuhan, Hubei, China
